queries.question: Which housekeepers work in Park View Inn hotel and which laundry attendants work in the same hotel?
queries.sql:
SELECT CleaningProfessionals.name 
FROM CleaningProfessionals JOIN Hotels ON CleaningProfessionals.hotel_id = Hotels.id
WHERE (CleaningProfessionals.type = "Housekeeper" OR CleaningProfessionals.type = "Laundry Attendant") AND Hotels.name = "Park View Inn"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?cleaningprofessionals a :CleaningProfessionals .
  ?hotels a :Hotels .
  ?cleaningprofessionals p:hasHotels ?hotels .
  ?cleaningprofessionals p:name ?name .
  ?cleaningprofessionals p:type ?type_w .
  ?cleaningprofessionals p:type ?type_w2 .
  ?hotels p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?type_w) = "Housekeeper" || STR(?type_w2) = "Laundry Attendant")) && STR(?name_w) = "Park View Inn"))
}

queries.question: Give me housekeepers and laundry attendants that work in Park View Inn hotel.
queries.sql:
SELECT CleaningProfessionals.name 
FROM CleaningProfessionals JOIN Hotels ON CleaningProfessionals.hotel_id = Hotels.id
WHERE CleaningProfessionals.type = "Housekeeper" OR CleaningProfessionals.type = "Laundry Attendant" AND Hotels.name = "Park View Inn"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?cleaningprofessionals a :CleaningProfessionals .
  ?hotels a :Hotels .
  ?cleaningprofessionals p:hasHotels ?hotels .
  ?cleaningprofessionals p:name ?name .
  ?cleaningprofessionals p:type ?type_w .
  ?cleaningprofessionals p:type ?type_w2 .
  ?hotels p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((STR(?type_w) = "Housekeeper" || (STR(?type_w2) = "Laundry Attendant" && STR(?name_w) = "Park View Inn")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me housekeepers and laundry attendants that work in Park View Inn hotel.
